title: 7adda
description:
Software development in MaxMSP for live video on stage featuring:
	                        / Real time white silhouette lighting following the performer on stage using a Kinect
	                        / Real time video sampler to loop the silhouette with an accumulation option allowing the performer to create a crowd of silhouettes behind her
	                        / Cued playback & smooth transitions and composition of video sequences, realtime silhouettes and a realtime RGB image from a second camera
	                        / Cued DMX lighting controls
